---
title: Stata to R Workshop
author: Stephen Thompson
date: 2026-07-10
institute: UCL Centre for Advanced Research Computing and UCL Innovative Clinical Trials Unit
title-image: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/278628511?s=400&u=ba33ed091d293c8e9da8789d491a2c1964c3a53c&v=4
title-image-width: 30%
title-image-alt: The Stata2R Logo, an R overlaid with white squares.
format:
  revealjs:
    logo: images/arc-logo.svg
---

{{< include _content.qmd >}}
